title: Generate R program to derive ADSL (Subject-Level (disposition focus))

inputs.prompt: Write an R program using the admiral package to create the ADSL (Subject-Level (disposition focus)) analysis dataset. The program must: (1) Read relevant SDTM source datasets and merge with ADSL, (2) Derive key variables: DISCONFL, DSRAEFL, EOSSTT, DCSREAS, TRTDURD, (3) Handle disposition flag derivation, discontinuation reasons, end-of-study status, treatment duration calculation, (4) Apply ADaM variable attributes and metadata per specification, (5) Output xpt dataset with proper labels. The dataset contains approximately 254 records.
